─[ Discovery Rule — Cursor ]─ ┐

Discovery Rule — Cursor

Platform-specific changes for Cursor in /home/andrew/Github/lore.

Scope

  • Update default nudge string in .cursor/hooks/capture-nudge.js line 86 to match lib/tracker.js wording
  • Verify .cursor/hooks/session-init.js inherits lib/banner.js changes (uses buildBanner)
  • Verify .cursor/rules/lore-core.mdc auto-generates correctly from updated instructions.md
  • Document limitation: Cursor has no per-prompt hook equivalent — work tracking nudge cannot be added

Deliverables

  • .cursor/hooks/capture-nudge.js updated with new nudge string
  • Existing tests pass (npm test)

Platform Limitations

Cursor’s beforeSubmitPrompt hook (if it exists) does not support agent_message injection. The only hook that can inject context into the agent’s view (besides sessionStart) is beforeShellExecution. Per-prompt work tracking nudges are not possible in Cursor without upstream changes.

Success Criteria

  • capture-nudge.js default message matches lib/tracker.js default
  • No regressions in test/cursor-hooks.test.js
  • generate-cursor-rules.sh produces valid .mdc with updated instructions
